hooks.command: bash -c 'file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ -n "$file" ]] && [[ "$file" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|py)$ ]] && [[ ! "$file" =~ (test|spec|__test__|_test) ]]; then echo "Reminder: This source file should have corresponding tests. Check if tests exist and update them if behavior changed."; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'input="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$input" | grep -q "git commit"; then echo "Verify: commit message follows format: <type>(scope): <description> (feat/fix/chore/docs/test/refactor)"; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'prompt="$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT"; cmd=$(echo "$prompt" | grep -oE "^/[a-z-]+" | head -1); if [[ -n "$cmd" ]]; then cmd_name=${cmd#/}; repo_root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); cmd_dir="${repo_root}/.claude/commands"; if [[ -f "${cmd_dir}/${cmd_name}.md" ]]; then echo "Command /${cmd_name} found."; else echo "Warning: /${cmd_name} is not a registered command. Available: $(ls ${cmd_dir}/*.md 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} basename {} .md | tr \"\n\" \", \")"; fi; fi; exit 0'
